mapper.sql: id, tenant_id, operation_type, account_code, item_code, dimension_key, quantity_delta, balance_quantity, locked_quantity, target_account_code, target_item_code, target_dimension_key, source_object_code, source_record_id, source_detail_id, lock_id, correlation_id, idempotency_key, remark, extra_data, create_by, create_time, create_dept, update_by, update_time
